scenario.title: Bulk relabel issues using one sentence
steps: Verify the confirmation names every affected issue
Verify per-item success and failure results

assertions.description: The requested issue stack is listed with every issue title
The confirmation names every issue and the to-refine label
Applying once reports a result for every issue including partial failure

prMarkdown:
## Visual Evidence
### Bulk relabel issues using one sentence

![Bulk relabel confirmation naming every affected issue](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CKGrafico/orbion/4cecd344234a7045bd087fc6deef6b3989d6ec45/openspec/changes/gh-142-bulk-relabel/evidence/01-confirmation.webp)
![Bulk relabel per-item results with success and failure](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CKGrafico/orbion/4cecd344234a7045bd087fc6deef6b3989d6ec45/openspec/changes/gh-142-bulk-relabel/evidence/02-result.webp)

<details>
<summary>Automated validation scenario</summary>

1. List issues labeled to-implement
2. Enter mark these as to-refine
3. Verify the confirmation names every affected issue
4. Apply once
5. Verify per-item success and failure results

</details>
